channel.title: Anthropic News
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Anthropic

item.title: Introducing a way to reflect on how you use Claude
item.description: Introducing a way to reflect on how you use Claude

item.title: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust
item.description: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust

item.title: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI
item.description: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI

item.title: Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
item.description: Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research

item.title: Apply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants
item.description: Apply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants

item.title: Anthropic is donating another $20 million to Public First Action
item.description: Anthropic is donating another $20 million to Public First Action

item.title: Ask Claude about the Anthropic Economic Index
item.description: Ask Claude about the Anthropic Economic Index

item.title: A research agenda for the Economic Futures Research Fund
item.description: A research agenda for the Economic Futures Research Fund

item.title: Inviting hard questions
item.description: We’re asking the public for their hardest questions about AI, and committing to show our work as we address them.

item.title: Redeploying Fable 5
item.description: Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.

item.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.

item.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available
item.description: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
